title: French Tart Galette
description: A delicious pastry dessert that combines the flakiness of a galette crust with the richness of a French tart filling.
instructions: Roll out the French galette dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a separate bowl, mix together the challot pastry cream, tart cherries, and granulated sugar.
Pour the cream mixture into the tart shell.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Drizzle the gooey caramel sauce over the top of the tart.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh fruit if desired.
